name: MCP Bridge
description: Bridge between Super Productivity and MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for Claude Desktop integration
author: Ben Elliot

changelog.2.2.1: Fix duplicate sidebar entry — remove explicit registerMenuEntry, SP auto-registers iFrame plugins
changelog.2.2.0: Bridge hardening — plugin exponential backoff reconnect, MCP server auto-reconnect, daemon session TTL, dashboard visibility fix, dev hot-reload proxy
changelog.2.1.0: Singleton bridge daemon — multiple Claude sessions share one SP plugin connection via superproductivity-mcp-bridge
changelog.2.0.0: Rewrite plugin IPC from file-based (nodeExecution) to HTTP fetch — works as uploaded plugin, auto port selection 27833–27840
changelog.1.3.0: Subtask nesting fix, MCP install card, plugin artifact rename, httpx pin
changelog.1.2.6: Fix subtask nesting (set parentId + subTaskIds), add fix_subtask_links repair tool
changelog.1.2.1: Dashboard UI redesign — settings card with vertical form and directory listings, clear logs button in log card
changelog.1.2.0: MCP API redesign — 16-tool surface, server-side tag/project resolution, human-readable time, due dates, batch create, completed task history, convert_to_subtask
changelog.1.1.1: Fix SP double-write bug when creating subtasks with parentId
changelog.1.1.0: Structured log levels, MCP call instrumentation, dashboard log delivery fix, log level selector UI
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with full MCP bridge functionality
